questions.question: Which apostle did King Herod kill with a sword?
Who came to the door when Peter knocked after escaping prison, but was too overjoyed to open it?
Peter was rescued from prison by an earthquake that opened the doors.
An _____ of the Lord struck Herod because he didn't give God the glory, and he was eaten by worms and died.
Peter was sleeping between two _____, bound with two chains, when the angel appeared.
